creator: olivierd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 157200
Patch to update x11-themes/gnome-icons-elementary

I opened bug, in order to fix revision 1453 [1]. Thanks.

I'm working to port Pantheon Shell, so you can follow Atom feed [2], or the whole announce feed [3].

[1] https://bugs.launchpad.net/elementaryicons/+bug/1459091
[2] http://feeds.launchpad.net/elementaryicons/announcements.atom
[3] http://feeds.launchpad.net/elementary/announcements.atom
